description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, including a variety of trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout with large windows and open spaces. The front of the bungalow is set back from a paved driveway lined with decorative trees, leading to a carport or garage area. The backyard includes a pool bordered by greenery and privacy hedges, while the side yards are landscaped with ornamental plants and small bushes. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored materials, contrasting with the darker roof and window frames. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and seamless integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, surrounded by landscaped gardens, a driveway, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, and main entrance flanked by decorative trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open backyard, pool area, and dense landscaping along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, privacy hedges, and the flat roofline with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, side garden, and the pool partially obscured by trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
